en_title: Steam Deck Price Increase Announced by Valve

paragraphs.cn: 更新时间：2026年5月27日 18:22 UTC（北京时间5月28日凌晨2:22）

paragraphs.en: Valve has announced a substantial price increase for the Steam Deck. The company announced today that all new OLED models are officially back in stock after months of being out of stock, but they will be getting a price increase. The lowest-tier model, the 512GB OLED Steam Deck, was previously $549 and will now cost $789. The premium 1TB OLED Steam Deck was previously $649 and will now cost $949. Valve stated that "these new prices reflect the current state of component costs and other global logistical challenges across the industry as a whole."
paragraphs.cn: Valve宣布Steam Deck大幅涨价。该公司今日宣布，在缺货数月之后，全新OLED机型正式恢复库存，但售价将上调。入门款512GB OLED Steam Deck原价$549（约人民币3,929元），现售$789（约人民币5,650元）；高配款1TB OLED Steam Deck原价$649（约人民币4,646元），现售$949（约人民币6,795元）。Valve表示：「这些新价格反映了元器件成本现状以及整个行业所面临的全球物流挑战。」

paragraphs.en: Refurbished LCD Steam Decks sold through Steam will not suffer a price increase, though it does appear that the refurbished OLED Steam Decks will still cost more than their original price. The refurbished 512GB and 1TB OLEDs now cost $629 and $759, respectively. If you're okay with a slightly less premium handheld, the refurbished versions of the now-discontinued LCD Steam Decks are a solid option. 64GB LCD costs $279, the 256GB LCD costs $319, and the 512GB LCD costs $359.
paragraphs.cn: 通过Steam售卖的翻新版LCD Steam Deck不会涨价，但翻新OLED版价格仍高于原售价。翻新512GB和1TB OLED目前分别售$629（约4,503元）和$759（约5,433元）。如果你能接受稍微低端些的掌机，已停产的LCD版翻新机也是不错选择：64GB LCD售$279（约1,997元）、256GB LCD售$319（约2,283元）、512GB LCD售$359（约2,570元）。

paragraphs.en: The PC handheld has been a beloved piece of gaming tech for a while, partially thanks to its value. It allows for a premium gaming experience on the go, and previously, it was relatively affordable. Now, the Steam Deck will likely be a harder sell, especially as it now gets into the price range of other high-end handhelds like the Xbox Rog Ally X, which costs $999.99.
paragraphs.cn: 这款PC掌机长久以来都备受欢迎，性价比是重要原因之一。它让玩家能在路上享受高品质游戏体验，而且过去价格相对亲民。如今Steam Deck恐怕会更难推销，特别是它已进入Xbox ROG Ally X等高端掌机的价格区间——后者售价$999.99（约7,160元）。

paragraphs.en: Valve isn't the only one raising prices on its hardware. The three major gaming platforms (Xbox, PlayStation, and Nintendo) have all raised prices on their consoles, making it one of the only times in history when prices for consoles went up instead of down during a generation. A regular PS5, for instance, now costs $100 - $150 more than it did in 2020.
paragraphs.cn: Valve并不是唯一上调硬件价格的厂商。三大主机平台（Xbox、PlayStation、Nintendo）都已上调了主机价格，这也成为历史上为数不多的主机一代生命周期内涨价而非降价的情形。例如，普通版PS5如今的售价比2020年贵了$100到$150（约人民币715至1,073元）。

paragraphs.en: The news also comes amidst growing concerns that Valve's console-like device, the Steam Machine, will be unaffordable. Valve has yet to announce a price for the Steam Machine, leading to feverish speculation. The device aims to be a PC for your living room, and some hoped that would mean that even if it's more expensive than an Xbox or a PS5, it will at least still be more affordable than a PC. However, the rising costs of things like RAM mean that it may not even be possible for Valve. With the Steam Deck getting a massive price increase, one has to imagine that the Steam Machine will suffer as well.
paragraphs.cn: 这一消息也加剧了外界对Valve主机设备Steam Machine价格难以承受的担忧。Valve尚未公布Steam Machine的售价，引发种种猜测。该设备定位为「客厅PC」，部分玩家曾希望即便它比Xbox或PS5更贵，至少还会比组装一台PC便宜。然而，内存等元器件成本攀升意味着Valve可能连这一目标都难以实现。Steam Deck既然大幅涨价，可以想见Steam Machine也将面临同样压力。

paragraphs.en: The Steam Machine is currently expected to release sometime in 2026. It's unclear when Valve may reveal a release date or pricing information. It seems like Valve is waiting things out before it makes a definitive pricing decision, but the clock is ticking unless the company wants to indefinitely delay the new hardware.
paragraphs.cn: Steam Machine目前预计将于2026年内某个时间发售。Valve何时公布发售日期或定价信息尚未明朗。看起来Valve是想再观察一下市场再做最终的定价决策，但留给他们的时间不多了——除非该公司打算无限期推迟这款新硬件。
